name: rate_type_with_matched_column_params
description: Verify that play-level params are applied to denominator CTE when rate_type_column_params is present
expected_query: with "tf67d3a60d5e6d4f5fa663665ddd6c61e" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" as "pid", SUM(CASE WHEN psr_pid IS NOT NULL AND (sk IS NULL OR sk = false) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."targeted_receiver_separation" in ('OPEN', 'WIDE_OPEN') group by "nfl_plays"."psr_pid"), "rate_aggregate_f0f7893b66d7" as materialized (select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS m_dc7a82da7c34 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2023) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."targeted_receiver_separation" in ('OPEN', 'WIDE_OPEN') group by nfl_plays.trg_pid) select "player"."pid", CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_f0f7893b66d7.m_dc7a82da7c34) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(tf67d3a60d5e6d4f5fa663665ddd6c61e.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS trg_from_plays_0, "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "tf67d3a60d5e6d4f5fa663665ddd6c61e" on "tf67d3a60d5e6d4f5fa663665ddd6c61e"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_f0f7893b66d7" on "rate_aggregate_f0f7893b66d7"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
